function_reachability: Is it impossible for function 'printf' to reach function 'main'?

Is the loop with condition 'i > -1*count' always executed?
dominators: Does the statement line 19:  <statement> printf("---\n"); </statement> dominate line 14:  <statement> char **cur_name = &names[i]; </statement>?
Does the statement line 6:  <statement> int count = sizeof(ages)/sizeof(int); </statement> dominate line 23:  <statement> printf("---\n"); </statement>?
data_dependency: Does the value of variable cur_name at line 14: <statement> 	char **cur_name = &names[i]; </statement> depend on the value of variable names at line 5: <statement> 	char *names[] = {"Alan", "Frank", "Mary", "John", "Lisa"}; </statement>?

liveness: Is variable 'q' live at the end of function 'main'?
